case_title: MINA GHALY VS. NORVETO AGCAOILI et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT AGCAOILI, NORVETO TOOKAS, LAVETTE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHALY, MINA AS TO DEFENDANT AGCAOILI, NORVETO TOOKAS, LAVETTE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY/LOST ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHALY, MINA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AGCAOILI, NORVETO TOOKAS, LAVETTE
